catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Product User Manual for Arctic Ocean Sea and Sea-Ice Surface Temperature Products, detailing specifications for SEAICE_ARC_PHY_CLIMATE_L4_MY_011_016 and SEAICE_ARC_PHY_CLIMATE_L3S_MY_011_021 products.
